arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Legia Warsaw - Conference League
arts.sum: How Chelsea could line up for their Conference League clash with Legia Warsaw on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Romano drops Delap BOMBSHELL: Top Chelsea target available for bargain fee
arts.sum: Ipswich Town sharpshooter Liam Delap will be available for just €35 million due to a relegation release clause, according to Fabrizio Romano. According to Fabrizio Romano, there is nothing Ipswich can do to prevent Delap from leaving this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal win Gyokeres race with sensational contract offer: Chelsea and Man Utd beaten
arts.sum: FootballTransfers has previously detailed that Arsenal have put themselves to the front of the race for Athletic Club winger Nico Williams thanks to their strong financial advantage, and they are set to put this muscle to good use in order to land the Sporting CP striker. Gyokeres is set to be offered a bumper deal worth around €60 million (£50m) over five years, according to Just Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca lays down challenge to Chelsea stars - 'Make us a better team'
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca hopes his Chelsea players show plenty of bravery in front of passionate crowd away to Legia Warsaw in their Europa Conference League quarter-final on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Maresca expects Chelsea duo to return soon
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca expects Romeo Lavia and Marc Guiu to return for Chelsea before the end of the season but has confirmed Wesley Fofana will miss the rest of the campaign. Fofana, plagued by injuries since his 2022 move from Leicester, recently underwent hamstring surgery. Lavia has also been troubled by injuries since being signed and […] The post Maresca expects Chelsea duo to return soon appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star got ‘knocked out’ in one of ‘so many’ training ground fights between players
arts.sum: Former Chelsea midfielder John Obi Mikel has opened up on the ferocious battles that would regularly break out at the club's Cobham training ground during his time with the Blues

arts.ttl: Chelsea can complete bargain Liam Delap transfer after secret release clause revealed
arts.sum: football.london understands that, when Delap signed his five-year contract at Ipswich last summer, there was a clause inserted that he could leave for £10m less if the club didn't stay in the Premier League. While he has been unable to prevent Ipswich from dropping 12 points adrift from safety, in their relegation battle, he has enjoyed a fine individual season and there's no surprise that Chelsea want to sign him.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea look to steal a march on Tottenham with another approach for £43m star
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham have both been linked with the same player in recent months, but it’s the Blues who are looking to steal a march...

arts.ttl: Chelsea star should push for move away if Enzo Maresca snubs him again for Conference League quarter-final - opinion
Chelsea target Liam Delap has £30m release clause ahead of summer transfer battle
arts.sum: Ipswich star is expected to be on the move this summer for a cut-price fee
